case_title: ADMON ARAJ VS. LISA CASTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2151 IRVING STREET, SUITE 205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARAJ, ADMON SERVED SEP-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LISA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 3
